name: airspace-monitor
description: Airspace monitoring and drone compliance. Check restricted zones, NOTAMs, flight clearance, and altitude limits. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: check_airspace
tools.description: Check if a location/altitude is safe for drone flight. Returns restrictions, nearby zones, and clearance status.

tools.name: get_no_fly_zones
tools.description: Get all no-fly zones within a radius of a location.

tools.name: get_drone_regulations
tools.description: Get drone flight regulations for a country (UK, US, EU, AU, CA).

tools.name: plan_flight
tools.description: Plan a drone flight path and check for restrictions along the route.
